title: YRT – Freeport Denizen
description: Generate a random NPC denizen encountered in the Freeport district of Yrt.

value.notes: Shops, stalls, warehouses, dockside deals; Freeport’s commercial lifeblood.
Natives and itinerant maritime labor; loading, sailing, repair.
Tanners, blacksmiths, coopers, weavers, bakers, other skilled trades.
City and peri-urban food production, plus vendors coming in from outside.
City defense and order. Runners ~50, guards ~150.
Mana-users working with costly materials; rare and prized.

value.type: Religious figures, healers, scribes, scholars, bankers
value.notes: Temple staff, priests, monks, scribes, scholars, and financial clerks.
Underclass, including orphans and those ‘touched’ or marginalized.
Innkeepers, tavern staff, courtesans, musicians, actors, general service.
Brotherhood, smugglers, pickpockets; dens and hidden networks.
Guildmasters, office-holders, old money families; very influential.
Outsiders, mercenaries, exiles, temporary labor drawn by Freeport’s trade.
